creator: freebsd@lanter-it.ch
text:
(In reply to Hannes Hauswedell from comment #47)

According 'sysctl hw.acpi.supported_sleep_state' T14 Gen3 AMD supports only S4 and S5.

I am very interested that "Suspend to disk" will work soon. I offer to help and test, but I don't have the in-depth knowledge to program this.
